summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AutoDamageIQ 5 new features: Image quality assessment, Repair type recommendation, Manual review queue, Enhanced severity scoring, and Anomaly/duplicate detection. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all new features display correctly.

issues: ESLint warnings for unused variables (rect, y1, y2) and missing useEffect dependencies - minor code quality issues

critical_code_review_comments: ResultPage.js has ESLint warnings for unused variables (rect, y1, y2) and missing useEffect dependencies - should be cleaned up for code quality
seed_data_creation: Test analyses created during testing using /app/assets/crash_*.jpg images
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new features are working correctly: (1) Image quality assessment returns blur, brightness, resolution, reflection metrics with quality_level in Turkish (Yuksek/Orta/Dusuk), (2) Repair recommendations map damage_type × severity to repair actions, (3) Manual review queue flags low confidence or high risk analyses, (4) Enhanced severity includes area_ratio, type weight, confidence factor, (5) Anomaly detection uses perceptual hashing for duplicate detection. Test images at /app/assets/crash_*.jpg. Duplicate detection works - uploading same image twice increases anomaly score.

image_quality_assessment.returns: quality_score, quality_level (Yuksek/Orta/Dusuk), is_acceptable, warnings, metrics (blur_variance, mean_brightness, resolution, reflection_ratio, contrast)

repair_type_recommendation.returns: repair_type, repair_type_tr, description_tr, cost_level, cost_level_tr, panel_multiplier, recommendation_confidence

manual_review_queue.returns: List of analyses with needs_review=true, mark as reviewed functionality

enhanced_severity_score.returns: score, class, label (Dusuk/Orta/Yuksek), area_ratio, base_severity, area_factor, confidence_factor

anomaly_duplicate_detection.returns: anomaly_score, risk_level, signals (duplicate_image, quality_anomaly, pixel_anomaly), action_tr

ui_features_verified.review_banner: PASS - Shows 'Manuel Inceleme Onerilir' with review reasons
ui_features_verified.quality_warning_banner: PASS - Shows 'Goruntu Kalite Uyarisi' with warnings
ui_features_verified.anomaly_score_display: PASS - Shows anomaly score in summary
ui_features_verified.anomaly_signals_section: PASS - Shows signals with Turkish messages
ui_features_verified.repair_recommendations: PASS - Shows repair type badges in damage cards
ui_features_verified.severity_details: PASS - Shows Siddet label and Alan percentage
